title: Create AI Skill Package Inputs
description: Inputs accepted by scaffold.py to create a new AISKILL-{SLUG} repository.

aiskills_root.description: Absolute path to the folder containing all AISKILL repos (e.g. /Volumes/ai-skill-packages/aiskills).

name.description: Human-readable skill name (e.g. 'WCAG Contrast Audit'). The UPPER-KEBAB-CASE slug is auto-derived from this.

description.description: One-line purpose statement written in the third person (e.g. 'Audits foreground/background colour pairs for WCAG 2.1 contrast compliance.').

author_email.description: Contact email address for the author.

type.description: Skill type: procedural (step-by-step), analytical (evaluate/report), or generative (produce content).

id_domain.description: Reverse-domain prefix for the manifest id field (e.g. com.openaiskillpackage). Must be a domain you control.

github_org.description: GitHub organisation or user name (e.g. YourGitHubOrg). Used to construct the remote URL: https://github.com/{github_org}/AISKILL-{SLUG}.git

license.description: SPDX licence identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0) or 'Proprietary'.

slug.description: Override the auto-derived UPPER-KEBAB-CASE slug. If omitted, derived from --name.
